title: pedicularis novaiae-zemliae
intro: Pedicularis novaiae-zemliae, also known as Nova Zemlya lousewort, is a flowering plant species of the genus Pedicularis. It is a perennial herb native to the Arctic tundra regions of Russia and Norway. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of phenolic compounds and alkaloids. Herbal preparations from Pedicularis novaiae-zemliae have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, and are believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects.
